title: Metal Apples
description: A mod for add tiered apple in minecraft. You can customize mod for add custom apple.
body:
This mod add tiered vanilla apple like iron, lapis, diamond...
![Tiered Apple low view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NwhkTPM7/images/e6e01cdf6657df90f7e51411841fbf119a4c8510.png)
But you can create custom apple with one example of emerald_apple
![Emerald Apple (an example)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NwhkTPM7/images/bf94d367452ba5549d379dfcf35cdc81807ac50f.png)
You can customize apple effect like duration, amplifier or add new effect with json file.
![Vanilla Tiered Apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NwhkTPM7/images/8ae0ddf23bf7115a8602a2e466ed9227b3de3d1d.png)
